scope: Cycle 5 files: merlin_responsive.gd, merlin_visual.gd, MenuPrincipalMerlin.gd, HubAntre.gd, Calendar.gd, Collection.gd, IntroPersonalityQuiz.gd, TransitionBiome.gd, broceliande_forest_3d.gd

bugs_found.description: Calendar._get_season_for_date() used wrong month ranges (Feb=spring, Aug=autumn) vs MerlinVisual standard (3-5 spring, 6-8 summer, 9-11 autumn, else winter). Wheel of the Year and season display showed wrong season for Feb, Aug, Nov.
bugs_found.fix: Aligned month ranges to match MerlinVisual.get_current_season(): 3-5 spring, 6-8 summer, 9-11 autumn, default winter.

bugs_found.description: Calendar._load_meta_stats() used dot notation state.meta on Dictionary. Same unsafe pattern as BUG-012 (ollama_backend). Fails silently in typed Dictionary context.
bugs_found.fix: Changed to state.get('meta', {}) with explicit Dictionary type hint.

bugs_found.description: HubAntre._show_memoires_panel() and _show_journal_panel() declared local var store: Node shadowing class member store (set in _connect_store). Both variables reference the same node but shadowing is confusing and breaks if class member changes.
bugs_found.fix: Removed redundant local variable declarations, using class member store directly.

overall_assessment: 3 bugs found in cycle 5 files. 1 HIGH (season mapping) + 2 MEDIUM (dict access pattern, variable shadowing). All fixed. Total bugs fixed across all cycles: 21 (2 CRITICAL + 6 HIGH + 8 MEDIUM + 5 misc). 10 files scanned, 2 files modified.
